parameters.query:
UPDATE normalized_findings SET
  validation_status = '{{ $json.validation_status }}',
  validation_notes = '{{ $json.analyst_notes.replace(/'/g,"''") }}',
  validated_by = '{{ $json.analyst_id }}',
  validated_at = NOW()
  {{ $json.updated_severity ? ",severity = '" + $json.updated_severity + "'" : '' }}
WHERE id = '{{ $json.finding_id }}'
RETURNING id, validation_status, recon_score, priority_bucket;

INSERT INTO validation_history (finding_id, previous_status, new_status, changed_by, notes)
SELECT '{{ $('Prepare Validation Update').first().json.finding_id }}',
       validation_status,
       '{{ $('Prepare Validation Update').first().json.validation_status }}',
       '{{ $('Prepare Validation Update').first().json.analyst_id }}',
       '{{ $('Prepare Validation Update').first().json.analyst_notes.replace(/'/g,"''") }}'
FROM normalized_findings WHERE id = '{{ $('Prepare Validation Update').first().json.finding_id }}';

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ ok: true, finding_id: $('Prepare Validation Update').first().json.finding_id, new_status: $('Prepare Validation Update').first().json.validation_status }) }}

parameters.query:
SELECT nf.id, nf.title, nf.severity, nf.recon_score, nf.priority_bucket,
       nf.validation_status, nf.first_seen, nf.is_recurring,
       a.asset_value, e.name as engagement_name, c.name as client_name
FROM normalized_findings nf
JOIN assets a ON nf.asset_id = a.id
JOIN engagements e ON nf.engagement_id = e.id
JOIN clients c ON e.client_id = c.id
WHERE nf.validation_status = 'pending_analyst'
  AND e.status = 'active'
ORDER BY nf.recon_score DESC
LIMIT 50;

meta.description: RECON OS WF-09: Validation Queue — daily 08:00 digest of findings pending analyst review sent to Slack. Webhook at /recon-os/findings/validate accepts analyst decisions. POST {finding_id, validation_status, analyst_notes}.
